ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned   4    5     3      4   The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, slightly affecting overall quality. Short note: Good balance with minor improvements needed for more fluidity.
